name: User Analytics
description: User Analytics gathers playback activity from live Jellyfin session events and stores it in a local SQLite database. It exposes a per-user analytics dashboard (admin) and a REST API showing play history, play counts, total watch time and most-watched items.
overview: Per-user playback analytics: play history, play counts and watch time.

versions.changelog: ### 2026.6.12 - Add play method breakdown chart (DirectPlay vs Transcode vs DirectStream) - Add date range picker to the plays-over-time chart - Add server-wide top content card - Fix plugin version not displaying correctly in Jellyfin settings

### 2026.6.12.1415
- Fix changelog text in manifest entries
- Fix plugin version not displaying correctly in Jellyfin settings

### 2026.6.12.1413
- Fix plugin version not displaying correctly in Jellyfin settings

### 2026.6.12.1409
- Add play method breakdown chart (DirectPlay / Transcode / DirectStream)
- Add date range picker to the plays-over-time chart
- Add server-wide top content card
- Replace placeholder dashboard mockup with real screenshots on the marketing page

### 2026.6.11.1153
- Initial release: live playback tracking, SQLite storage, per-user analytics dashboard and REST API
- Watch history backfill import from Jellyfin's existing play data
- Fix double-counted plays and watch time
